This game is entertaining but it does contain soft paywalls. What I mean by that is you can get rewarded currency in game but just enough to give you a taste of elite upgrades. Progression will grind to a halt if you don't buy the intro upgrades and occasionally pay to open piggy banks. The rewards start to get better after that. I'm not a huge fan of mobile game monetization but this game isn't as aggressive as most. The ads aren't mandatory but give you decent rewards for them but are cancer.

Solid idle game that would get 5 stars if not for two factors. One is drones. The Habitats are a sizable portion of the screen and many of my taps on drones bring up a new screen. It's annoying since it happens so often and also keeps you from tapping other drones. Second is for paying players only. I signed up for the ad-free subscription because there was always an ad to watch. after words, those chances are reduced significantly. They are larger as promised but still too rare.
Edit: can see more chickens than before. It's better directly after opening the game - a few minutes later i see like only 1 or 2 chickens maximum.

There's a pretty solid progression scheme where if you're making progress too slow, then it's time to prestige. I think my only current suggestion would be to make the drones easier to tap while flying over buildings and behind the UI, and expand how far you can pan the map.

Having played the game a while now, I've come to a few realizations. 1. This is not an idle game unless you pay real money for upgraded silos 2. Even if you have that upgrade, progression requires constantly spamming prestiges and building up specific farms over and over again to get the midgame boosts. You can't just check in a few times a day and expect to get anywhere 3. The in-game coop mechanic will almost exclusively pair you with duds, so you pretty much need to use third-party apps

Good simple idle pastime game. Don't need to spend, just sit back, chill, and check-in every once in a while, day, week, month or perhaps a year. Once you have an epic research maxed, and you get a free epic research from calendar, you will get gold eggs for what the cost of that research is. Easily one if the most fun F2P idle games out there, it's cute and simple. But has a depth and interactivity that a lot of others lack. The community for this game is extremely wholesome and supportive of new and veteran players alike. Whether it's the reddit page, or discord servers, I've only got good things to say. If you're looking for a cute, silly little game that you can both idly play from time to time, but still out focus and hard work in when you feel like it, this is the game for you.

I've been playing this game on and off for years, and it's become my go-to time killer, evolving from a simple tapper to a complex strategy game that I genuinely enjoy optimizing. ​If you're looking for a low-stress, high-satisfaction mobile game that can entertain you for five minutes or five hours, this game is a great example of an idle game that successfully layers depth onto a simple mechanic. Just be ready to commit, because those chickens will keep calling you back.

I have lost sleep over this game. I just always need more eggs. 🤣 This game is awesome. If you like to watch numbers grow exponentially, then this is it. If you haven't yet, give this boredom buster a try. You can mindlessly hold that chicken button for hours.

Edit 2025: I started playing this game back in high school for something to mindlessly look at to distract me from other stuff.
